about.title: About KKD PROPERTY CO., LTD.
about.intro: An engineering company specializing in solar power installation, construction, and industrial kitchen systems, committed to the highest service standards.
about.credRegisteredDesc: DBD registration no. 0105566007521 — verifiable, transparent, and trustworthy.
about.credEngineerDesc: We handle projects requiring certified engineer sign-off, fully compliant with the law and safe at every step.
about.credExperienceDesc: Over 200+ projects installed across homes, commercial buildings, and industrial factories.
about.teamDesc: Professional engineers and installers, trained to safety standards, taking care of your project from design through after-sales service.

meta.homeTitle: KKD PROPERTY - Complete Solar Installation by Licensed Engineers
meta.homeDesc: On-Grid, Hybrid and Off-Grid solar installation, plus panel cleaning and system inspection, by licensed engineers. Fully registered in Thailand.
meta.aboutDesc: Meet KKD PROPERTY CO., LTD., a solar engineering specialist with DBD registration and 200+ completed projects.
meta.servicesDesc: On-Grid, Hybrid and Off-Grid solar installation, plus professional panel cleaning and engineer system inspections.
meta.packagesDesc: 3KW, 5KW and 10KW solar packages with pricing. Tier 1 panels, 25-year warranty. Choose by your monthly bill.
meta.portfolioDesc: Real solar installations for homes, commercial buildings and industrial factories across Thailand.
